info.title: MJF App — Multi-Tenant Educational Platform API
info.description: Full API reference for the MJF multi-tenant educational platform. All tenant routes require a valid Sanctum Bearer token and an active current_tenant_id set on the authenticated user.

response_envelope.description: All responses are wrapped in a standard envelope.

routes.description: Check if the API is up and running.
Authenticate a central user and receive a Sanctum Bearer token.
Get the currently authenticated user with their active tenant and accessible tenants list.
Revoke the current access token.
Create a new tenant. Automatically provisions a dedicated database and runs tenant migrations. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

422.message: The slug has already been taken.

slug: The slug has already been taken.

routes.description: Set the active tenant for the authenticated user. The user must be the owner or a member of the tenant (or a super admin).

403.message: You do not have access to the selected tenant.

groups.name: Tenant — Health
groups.notes: All /api/tenant/* routes require: (1) valid Bearer token, (2) user must have current_tenant_id set.

routes.description: Check tenant context: confirms the correct tenant database is active for the authenticated user.
List all students in the active tenant.
Create a new student. Automatically creates a TenantUser of type 'student' and links it to the student profile.
Get a single student by ID.
Update a student and their linked tenant user. Password is optional on update.
Delete a student and their linked tenant user.
List all teachers in the active tenant.
Create a new teacher with an auto-created TenantUser of type 'teacher'.
Get a single teacher by ID.
Update a teacher and their linked tenant user. Password optional.
Delete a teacher and their linked tenant user.
List all courses in the active tenant.
Create a new course.
Get a single course by ID.
Update a course.
Delete a course.
List all classes in the active tenant.
Create a new class linked to a course and a teacher.
Get a single class by ID.
Update a class.
Delete a class.
List all enrollments in the active tenant.
Enroll a student in a class. Duplicate enrollment (same student + same class) is rejected with 422.

422.message: Student is already enrolled in this class.

student_id: Student is already enrolled in this class.

routes.description: Get a single enrollment by ID.
Update an enrollment (e.g., change status to completed or dropped).
Delete an enrollment.
List all assignments in the active tenant.
Create a new assignment for a class.
Get a single assignment by ID.
Update an assignment.
Delete an assignment.
List all submissions in the active tenant.
Submit an assignment. The student must be enrolled in the assignment's class. Grade cannot exceed assignment's max_grade.

student_not_enrolled.message: Student is not enrolled in the class for this assignment.

student_id: Student is not enrolled in the class for this assignment.

grade_exceeds_max.message: Grade exceeds the maximum allowed grade for this assignment.

grade: Grade exceeds the maximum allowed grade for this assignment.

routes.description: Get a single submission by ID.
Update a submission (e.g., add grade and feedback after grading).
Delete a submission.
List all grades in the active tenant.
Record a grade for a student. Either course_id or assignment_id must be provided (or both). If both are provided, the assignment must belong to the given course.

422.message: The assignment does not belong to the given course.

assignment_id: The assignment does not belong to the given course.

routes.description: Get a single grade by ID.
Update a grade record.
Delete a grade record.
List all announcements in the active tenant, ordered newest first.
Create a new announcement. audience_type can target 'all', 'students', 'teachers', or a specific 'class' (pass audience_id = class_id in that case).
Get a single announcement by ID.
Update an announcement.
Delete an announcement.
List all events in the active tenant, ordered newest first.
Create a new event. end_date must be on or after start_date if provided.

422.message: The end date field must be a date after or equal to start date.

end_date: The end date field must be a date after or equal to start date.

routes.description: Get a single event by ID.
Update an event.
Delete an event.

401_unauthenticated.cause: No token provided or token expired/revoked.

403_no_tenant.cause: User has no current_tenant_id set. Call POST /api/central/current-tenant first.

body.message: You do not have access to this tenant.

403_no_access.cause: User is not the owner or a member of the active tenant.

404_not_found.cause: The requested resource does not exist in the tenant database.
